sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] > 5:
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Compare with previous frame
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
    prev_nodes = {n['color']: n for n in prev_seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] > 5}
    curr_nodes = {n['color']: n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] > 5}
    print("\nChanges:")
    for color in set(list(prev_nodes.keys()) + list(curr_nodes.keys())):
        if color in prev_nodes and color in curr_nodes:
            p = prev_nodes[color]
            c = curr_nodes[color]
            if p['pixels'] != c['pixels'] or p['hash'] != c['hash']:
                print(f"  {color}: pixels {p['pixels']} -> {c['pixels']}, hash {p['hash']} -> {c['hash']}")
        elif color in prev_nodes:
            print(f"  {color}: disappeared")
        else:
            print(f"  {color}: appeared")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
